description: black to connect the group H18 on the right. there are many weaknesses to take advantage of. but which to choose?
sgf:
(;
AW [ba][da][fa][ab][bb][cb][db][fb][gb][jb][ec][gd][jd][kd][fe][he][ie][ke][ff][gf][if][eg][gh][ei][hi][ii][ij][ik] AB [ga][ha][hb][dc][hc][ic][bd][cd][ed][fd][id][ee][je][df][ef][hf][jf][dg][hg][ig][jg][hh][jh][ji]  C[Black to connect the isolated group.]

     (;B[gc] ;W[fc]
          (;B[fh] C[RIGHT Correct.])
          (;B[hd] ;W[ge]
               (;B[gg] ;W[fg] C[White wins.])
               (;B[fg] ;W[gg] C[White wins.])
               (;B[gi] ;W[fh] C[White wins.])
               (;B[fh]

                         (;B[fg] C[RIGHT Correct.])
                    )
                    (;W[gg] ;B[gi] C[RIGHT CHOICE Correct.])
                    (;W[gi] ;B[gg] C[RIGHT CHOICE Correct.])
                    (;W[eh] ;B[fg] C[RIGHT CHOICE Correct.])

          )

               (;W[jc] ;B[hd] C[RIGHT CHOICE Correct.])
               (;W[fg] ;B[hd] ;W[ge] ;B[eh] C[RIGHT CHOICE Correct.])
          )
     )

          (;B[gg] ;W[gc] C[White wins.])
          (;B[fc] ;W[gc] C[White wins.])
          (;B[fg] ;W[gg] C[White wins.])
          (;B[gi] ;W[fh] C[White wins.])
          (;B[fh] ;W[gc] C[White wins.])
          (;B[jc] ;W[kc] ;B[gc] ;W[fc] C[White wins.])
          (;B[gc] ;W[fc]

               (;B[jc] ;W[kc] ;B[fh] ;W[ia] C[White wins.])
               (;B[fh] 
                    (;W[jc] C[CHOICE]
                          (;B[gg] C[RIGHT Correct.])
                          (;B[fg] C[RIGHT Correct.])
                    )
                    (;W[gi] ;B[gg] C[RIGHT CHOICE Correct.])
                    (;W[eh] ;B[fg] C[RIGHT CHOICE Correct.])
               )
          )
     )
     (;B[fc] ;W[gc] ;B[hd] ;W[ge] C[White wins.])
     (;B[gi] ;W[fh] ;B[gc] ;W[fc] ;B[hd] ;W[ge] C[White wins.])
     (;B[fi] ;W[fh] ;B[gc] ;W[fc] ;B[hd] ;W[ge] C[White wins.])
     (;B[fg] ;W[gg] C[White wins.])
     (;B[fh] ;W[gc] C[White wins.])
     (;B[eb] ;W[gc] ;B[hd] ;W[ge] C[White wins.])
     (;B[jc] ;W[kc]
          (;B[fc] ;W[gc] C[White wins.])
          (;B[fh] ;W[gc] C[White wins.])
          (;B[gc] ;W[fc] ;B[hd] ;W[ge]
               (;B[fh] ;W[ia] C[White wins.])
               (;B[gg] ;W[fg] C[White wins.])
               (;B[fg] ;W[gg] C[White wins.])
          )
          (;B[hd] ;W[ge] ;B[gc] ;W[fc] 
               (;B[fh] ;W[ia] C[White wins.])
               (;B[gg] ;W[fg] C[White wins.])
               (;B[fg] ;W[gg] C[White wins.])
          )
          (;B[kb] ;W[lb]
